title: King Kong Gun
description: Luffy’s last attack breaks Doflamingo and ends the tyrant’s rule over Dressrosa.
scene: On pages 4–8, Doflamingo, King Riku, Rebecca, Dressrosa Citizens, Colosseum Fighters move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: that was a rather flamboyant resurgence...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I bet your Haki's barely returned, if at all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's probably all you can do...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Say the exact same thing about you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So you're still skulking around here, eh, law?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: This entire section of the city's turned to threads!

summary: This part focuses on king kong gun, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
